text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Listen to this, McQueen! The shop I<n>work
part-time at just started selling a<n>sweet treat I bet
you'd love!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh my! It must be good if it's receivedyour approval. And where might thissweets shop be?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh... Actually, it's at the<n>baseball
stadium! They made a new<n>crepe that's supposed
to look just like a<n>baseball field! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I know the exact one! I saw it last<n>week
while perusing the sto...res...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! I should've guessed you'd alreadyknow it! So you were in the stadiu—gasp!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Oh no! What have I done?! I knew she<n>was
secretly going to ball games, but I<n>was pretending
I didn't notice!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So the crepes at the stadium are so<n>popular that
the stores near school<n>started selling them too?
W-wow! Kind<n>of makes me proud to be working
there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Er... Yes, precisely! Obviously I would<n>never have
any reason to go all the way<n>to the stores at the
stadium! Your sweets<n>must be getting really
popular!
